body: {"ac_map":[{"parent_ac":"1. Go test `TestFederationForwardMutation_RoutesToOwner` proves a target node/project mutation is sent to exactly one owning spoke.","coverage":"Child `server: route forwarded federation mutations to one owner` AC1 covers the route-to-owner behavior."},{"parent_ac":"2. Go test `TestFederationForwardMutation_RejectsOfflineOrReadOnly` proves offline/stale/read_only spokes are refused without local fallback state.","coverage":"Child `server: route forwarded federation mutations to one owner` AC2 covers offline, stale, and read_only refusal without local fallback state; child `server: make forwarded federation mutations idempotent` AC3 covers retried refusals without fallback state."},{"parent_ac":"3. Go test `TestFederationForwardMutation_IdempotentRequestID` proves retrying a request id returns the original result without repeating the remote command.","coverage":"Child `server: make forwarded federation mutations idempotent` AC1 covers request-id replay without repeating the remote command."},{"parent_ac":"4. Go test `TestFederationForwardMutation_RejectsBroadcastTarget` proves a missing or multi-owner target is rejected.","coverage":"Child `server: route forwarded federation mutations to one owner` AC3 covers missing owner, missing project, and multi-owner broadcast-like target rejection."},{"parent_ac":"5. `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test -short ./internal/server/graphql/... ./internal/federation/...` passes.","coverage":"All children include this verification gate: child 1 AC4, child 2 AC5, and child 3 AC4."},{"parent_ac":"6. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.","coverage":"All children include this verification gate: child 1 AC5, child 2 AC6, and child 3 AC5."}],"child_ids":["ddx-e81c01de","ddx-1644ead2","ddx-abd08e19"],"rationale":"The parent bead combines three separable deliverables: defining the forwarding contract and typed errors, implementing owner resolution with single-spoke dispatch and refusal behavior, and adding idempotency/replay semantics. Each child preserves the governing artifact references, parent non-scope exclusions, parent id ddx-d5dfa702, and the required go test plus lefthook verification gates while narrowing the implementation surface to an independently executable change."}

summary: closed as dead-intermediate bead (all children closed, execution-eligible=false)
